examples.en: SARS is an atypical form of pneumonia.
examples.zh: SARS 是一種非典型的肺炎。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 無底的；極度的；極糟的

examples.en: Visitors to the slum were appalled by the abysmal living conditions they saw.
examples.zh: 來到貧民區的訪客，都對眼前極差的生活環境感到十分震驚。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 不識字的 [名] 文盲

examples.en: Fewer and fewer people are analphabetic nowadays.
examples.zh: 不識字的人如今愈來愈少了。

examples.en: My grandfather was an analphabetic all his life.
examples.zh: 我爺爺終其一生是個文盲。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: I never pay attention to anonymous letters.
examples.zh: 我從不理會匿名信。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: You mustn’t be apathetic about environmental protection.
examples.zh: 關於環保，你千萬不能漠不關心。

examples.en: Q: What’s the difference between “ignorance” and “apathy”? A: I don’t know and I don’t care.
examples.zh: 問：「無知」與「冷漠」有何不同？答：不知道，也不在乎！

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: He’s an atheist and doesn’t pray.
examples.zh: 他是個無神論者，從來不禱告。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Astronauts returning from extended stays in zero gravity often suffer from muscular atrophy.
examples.zh: 太空人長期處於零重力狀態，回來之後往往患有肌肉萎縮症。

examples.en: After two months in the hospital, my leg muscles had atrophied.
examples.zh: 住院兩個之後，我的腿部肌肉已經萎縮了。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: With infinite patience, the teacher answered the same question for the fifth time.
examples.zh: 老師以無限的耐心，第五度回答同樣的問題。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 不識字的 [名] 文盲

examples.en: You can’t expect an old illiterate farmer to be familiar with Shakespeare.
examples.zh: 你不能指望一個不識字的老農夫會懂莎士比亞。

examples.en: The man is an adult illiterate because he never went to school.
examples.zh: 此人是個不識字的成年男子，因為他從來沒有上過學。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: In his dream, the boy was immobilized with fear.
examples.zh: 在睡夢中，小男孩害怕到不能動彈。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: not / through / way / 形容詞字尾
words.definition: [形] 不能滲透的；不受影響的

examples.en: The plastic raincoat is impervious to water.
examples.zh: 這件塑膠雨衣不透水。

examples.en: The best-selling author is impervious to criticism.
examples.zh: 這位暢銷作家完全不受批評的影響。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The country’s insatiable demands for oil and steel have driven up prices.
examples.zh: 該國對石油與鋼鐵無止盡的需求，導致價格上漲。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Rocks are insensate objects.
examples.zh: 岩石是沒有知覺的物體。

examples.en: He’s an insensate boss who refuses to allow time off for funerals.
examples.zh: 他是個不講理的老闆，員工請喪假都不准。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The kid’s curiosity is irrepressible.
examples.zh: 這個小孩按不住他的好奇心。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Aging is an irreversible process; one can only try to slow it down.
examples.zh: 老化是無法逆轉的過程，我們只能設法延緩它的速度。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Minors can only buy nonalcoholic drinks.
examples.zh: 未成年人只能購買不含酒精的飲料。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Which do you prefer, fiction or nonfiction?
examples.zh: 你喜歡小說還是非小說？

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 無黨派色彩的，中立的

derivatives.meaning: [形] 有黨派色彩的 [名] 黨派支持者

examples.en: The government has organized a nonpartisan committee to study the issue objectively.
examples.zh: 政府成立一個中立的委員會，以客觀研究此議題。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The CFCT is a nonprofit, nongovernmental organization.
examples.zh: 中華民國消費者基金會是個非營利的非政府組織。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 直達的 [副] 直達地

examples.en: This is a nonstop flight to Tokyo.
examples.zh: 這是直飛東京的班機。

examples.en: I’m flying to Tokyo nonstop.
examples.zh: 我將直飛東京。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: not / intensifier / know / 形容詞字尾

examples.en: The boxer lay unconscious on the floor.
examples.zh: 拳擊手毫無意識地躺在地上。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: not / together / forward / send / 形容詞字尾
words.definition: [形] 不妥協的，堅持己見的

examples.en: The villagers have taken an uncompromising stand against building an incinerator nearby.
examples.zh: 村民對於附近興建焚化爐，採取毫不妥協的反對立場。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 未能預見的，出乎意料的

examples.en: The project started out smoothly, but soon there were unforeseen complications.
examples.zh: 計畫一開始很順利，不久卻衍生出始料未及的種種困難。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: not / in / have / 形容詞字尾

examples.en: Robinson Crusoe was marooned on an uninhabited island.
examples.zh: 魯賓遜·克魯索被孤立於一座無人島上。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] (理論)站不住腳的；岌岌可危的

examples.en: Spending beyond one’s means is an untenable situation.
examples.zh: 入不敷出是個岌岌可危情況。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Thank you all for your unwavering support.
examples.zh: 感謝各位始終不變的支持。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 公正的；無利益糾葛的

examples.en: Both sides are willing to listen to a disinterested third party.
examples.zh: 雙方都願意傾聽立場超然的第三者的意見。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: My kid sister is a shy, diffident girl.
examples.zh: 我小妹是個害羞、缺乏自信的女孩。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 散亂的 [動] 擴散，散布

examples.en: The lecturer spoke in a wordy, diffuse style.
examples.zh: 這名演講者講話的風格太冗長、散亂。

examples.en: The internet is a powerful means of diffusing knowledge.
examples.zh: 網路是散布知識的有力工具。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The man suffers from a visual disability.
examples.zh: 此人罹患視覺障礙。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The winner will be disclosed in a minute.
examples.zh: 獲勝者是誰，即將揭曉。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The students learn to dissect a frog in biology class.
examples.zh: 學生上生物課的時候學習解剖青蛙。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Distant mountains often appear pale blue.
examples.zh: 遠山看起來往往是淡藍色。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 反托拉斯的，反壟斷的

examples.en: US antitrust laws are akin to fair-trade laws in Taiwan.
examples.zh: 美國的反托拉斯法，類似台灣的公平交易法。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The discovery of antibiotics is a milestone in medical history.
examples.zh: 抗生素的發現，是醫療史上一大里程碑。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Gandhi’s nonviolence is a potent antidote to the prevalent violence in modern society.
examples.zh: 甘地倡導的非暴力，對於現代社會盛行的暴力是一劑強效解藥。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The natives have a strong antipathy against all outsiders.
examples.zh: 本地人對所有外來者都有強烈的反感。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: You can look up synonyms and antonyms in the thesaurus.
examples.zh: 你可以在同義字典中查到同義字與反義字。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: You should feel free to contradict me if you disagree.
examples.zh: 你若是不同意，大可以反駁我。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 違禁的 [名] 違禁品

examples.en: Buying contraband goods may get you into trouble.
examples.zh: 購買違禁品可能會讓你惹上麻煩。

examples.en: I don’t deal in contraband.
examples.zh: 我不做違禁品的買賣。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 引起爭議的，有爭議的

examples.en: Abortion is a highly controversial issue in the U.S.
examples.zh: 墮胎在美國是個具有高度爭議性的議題。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: This pill will counteract your stomach acid.
examples.zh: 這顆藥可以抑制你的胃酸。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 偽造的 [動] 偽造 [名] 偽鈔

examples.en: I got some counterfeit money in change this morning.
examples.zh: 今天早上我收到一些偽幣。

examples.en: It’s a crime to counterfeit a signature.
examples.zh: 偽造簽名是違法的。

examples.en: That $20 bill is a counterfeit.
examples.zh: 那張20元鈔票是偽鈔。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The President and his British counterpart—the Prime Minister—will have a summit soon.
examples.zh: 總統和他的英國對手——首相——即將進行高峰會。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [動] 遭遇 [名] 遭遇；偶遇

examples.en: You’re going to encounter enormous difficulties if you push for reform.
examples.zh: 如果你推動改革，將會遇到極大的困難。

examples.en: He met his future wife in an accidental encounter.
examples.zh: 他在一次意外的邂逅中遇見了未來的老婆。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The visitor was told to wait in the anteroom.
examples.zh: 訪客被告知，要在會客室稍等。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Humans and monkeys are said to have the same ancestors.
examples.zh: 人類與猴子據說有相同的祖先。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Handing out “red envelopes” on New Year’s Eve is an ancient Chinese custom.
examples.zh: 除夕發「紅包」是個古老的中國習俗。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The bank robbers have upped the ante by kidnapping three hostages.
examples.zh: 銀行搶匪提高了賭注，因為綁架了三名人質。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Gone with the Wind describes the passing of the antebellum South.
examples.zh: 《亂世佳人》描寫的是戰前美國南方社會的消逝。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The X-ray shows a tumor in the anterior lobe of the brain.
examples.zh: X光顯示大腦前葉有腫瘤。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Many experts anticipate that oil prices will keep rising.
examples.zh: 許多專家預期石油價格將持續上漲。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: These villagers are still using antiquated methods of farming.
examples.zh: 這些村民仍在使用過時的農耕方式。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: I bought this old desk from an antique shop.
examples.zh: 這張老桌子我是在骨董店買的。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: This daycare center takes preschool kids only.
examples.zh: 這間托兒所只收學齡兒童。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Thanksgiving precedes Christmas.
examples.zh: 感恩節在耶誕節之前。

examples.en: There is a synonym to this word in the preceding sentence.
examples.zh: 上一句中有這個字的同義字。

examples.en: Security always takes precedence over speed.
examples.zh: 與速度相比，永遠是安全優先。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The precocious child already has a girlfriend.
examples.zh: 這個早熟的小孩已經交到女朋友了。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The astrologer predicts that an important political figure will be assassinated this year.
examples.zh: 這名占星術士預言今年有位重量級政治人物將遇刺。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: If you are really in a hurry, you can buy a prefabricated house.
examples.zh: 你要是急，可以買預製組件的組合屋。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Such a step would be premature at this stage.
examples.zh: 在這個階段，要採取這一步還太早。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 前提，假設 [動] 預設為前提

examples.en: There is a fallacy in the basic premises of the argument.
examples.zh: 這項論證，在基本前提中有個謬誤。

examples.en: He premised his argument on several incorrect assumptions.
examples.zh: 他把論證的基礎建立在幾項不正確的假設上。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: I had a premonition that an accident might happen, so I chose to stay home.
examples.zh: 我早有預感可能會出事，所以選擇留在家裡。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 預知的，有預知能力的

examples.en: The expert gave prescient warning several days before the flood.
examples.zh: 專家在洪水發生前幾天，未卜先知地提出了警告。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Before the accident, I had had a presentiment of what might happen.
examples.zh: 意外發生前，我有預感會出什麼事。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: We must preserve the environment for posterity.
examples.zh: 我們得保護好環境，留給後代。

examples.en: Preserved fruit can be very delicious.
examples.zh: 醃漬的水果也可以很好吃。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: not / before / go / 形容詞字尾

examples.en: The internet pools human resources in unprecedented ways.
examples.zh: 網路以前所未有的方式匯集人力資源。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 過程，程序 [動] 加工；處理

examples.en: The application process takes about three months.
examples.zh: 申請作業程序大約要三個月。

examples.en: This plant processes nearly one thousand tons of sewage a day.
examples.zh: 這家工廠每天處理近千噸汙水。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: There’s a pro-life demonstration on the square.
examples.zh: 廣場上正在進行反墮胎示威。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Humans and monkeys share the same progenitor.
examples.zh: 人類與猴子有共同的祖先。

examples.en: Sigmund Freud was the progenitor of modern psychology.
examples.zh: 西格蒙德·佛洛伊德是現代心理學的始祖。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: I often skip over the prologue while reading stories.
examples.zh: 我看小說的時候經常跳過序言不看。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Modern medicine has managed to prolong human life substantially.
examples.zh: 現代醫學成功地大幅延長人類的壽命。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The girl gazed at the superstar in admiration.
examples.zh: 小女孩望著大明星，一臉欽佩的神情。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: “Vice President” is often abbreviated to “VP.”
examples.zh: 「副總統、副總裁」經常寫為VP。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: This sports car accelerates very fast.
examples.zh: 這輛跑車加速很快。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The man acquiesced to the unreasonable demand.
examples.zh: 此人順從於該不合理的要求。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The teacher admonished all the students not to cheat.
examples.zh: 老師警告所有學生不得作弊。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Smoking negatively affects your health.
examples.zh: 抽菸對健康有不好的影響。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: We cannot affirm that this painting is genuine.
examples.zh: 我們無法確定表示這幅畫是真跡。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Haste will only aggravate the situation.
examples.zh: 如果太倉促，只會讓局勢惡化。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: This pill will alleviate your headache.
examples.zh: 這顆藥可以緩和你的頭疼。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The government is trying to appraise the damage caused by the hurricane.
examples.zh: 政府正設法評估颱風所造成的損害。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: I did 13 months of obligatory military service.
examples.zh: 我服過 13 個月的義務兵役。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Are there any objections to the proposal?
examples.zh: 這項提案有人反對嗎？

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: In his Statement of Purpose the student listed his goal and short-term objectives.
examples.zh: 學生在「讀書計畫」中列出他的長程目標。

examples.en: Do you want my objective opinion?
examples.zh: 你想要我客觀的意見嗎？

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 長方形的；橢圓形的 [名] 長方形；橢圓形

examples.en: An American football is oblong in shape.
examples.zh: 美式足球的形狀為橢圓形。

examples.en: Size A4 printing paper is an oblong.
examples.zh: A4 大小的影印紙是長方形。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Cassette recorders are obsolete.
examples.zh: 卡式錄音機已經淘汰了。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: We encountered many obstacles on the way but overcame every one of them.
examples.zh: 一路上我們遭遇許多阻礙，但都一一克服了。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: It will be very hard to persuade him for he is an obstinate man.
examples.zh: 要說服他很難，因為他很固執。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Some say East and West will never meet, meaning the Orient and the Occident will always remain incompatible.
examples.zh: 有人說「東與西不相逢」，意思是說東方與西方永遠不合。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

derivatives.meaning: [形] 令人不快的 [名] 進攻

examples.en: The woman felt offended when she failed to receive an invitation to the big party.
examples.zh: 這名女士覺得不快，因為有一場盛大的宴會沒有邀請她。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The university culture is opaque to entering students.
examples.zh: 大學的文化，新生難以理解。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The tyrant oppressed his people brutally.
examples.zh: 這名暴君以殘酷手段壓迫他的子民。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: A lizard can regenerate a tail easily.
examples.zh: 蜥蜴要再生一條尾巴很容易。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: After the surgery, the man went to the countryside for recuperation.
examples.zh: 手術過後，此人到鄉下去療養。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: It is time to redress the injustices of the past.
examples.zh: 過去的不公，現在該矯正過來了。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The drug addict was sent to the rehabilitation center.
examples.zh: 該名有毒癮的人被送去勒戒中心了。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The company will reimburse your travel expenses on your return.
examples.zh: 這趟出差回來以後，公司會補償你的開銷。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: again / in / flesh / 名詞字尾

examples.en: Tibetan Buddhists believe in the reincarnation of the soul.
examples.zh: 藏傳佛教徒相信靈魂輪迴轉世。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Copper is a good conductor because its resistance is small.
examples.zh: 銅是良導體，因為電阻很小。

examples.en: The French Resistance fought the Nazis heroically in World War II.
examples.zh: 法國反抗軍於二次大戰期間英勇對抗納粹。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The bombing was in retaliation for an air strike.
examples.zh: 此炸彈攻擊是為了報復一次空襲。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

derivatives.meaning: [形] 回顧的 [名] 回顧展

examples.en: In retrospect, maybe we shouldn’t have invested so much into the project.
examples.zh: 事後回顧起來，或許這項計畫我們當初不該投資這麼多。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The police didn’t reveal the man’s identity.
examples.zh: 警方沒有透露此人的身分。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Chemical analysis shows that the water is contaminated with lead.
examples.zh: 化學分析顯示水遭到鉛汙染。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 時代混淆，時代錯亂；不合時宜者

derivatives.meaning: [形] 時代錯亂的；不合時宜的

examples.en: The movie is set in the 16th century, so it’s an anachronism to hear the characters discussing gravity.
examples.zh: 電影的背景是 16 世紀，所以聽到片中人物談到重力是搞錯時代了。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: “Elvis lives!” is an anagram.
examples.zh: Elvis lives 是一組重組字（Elvis 拆開可重組為 lives）。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Postmodern architecture is not completely utilitarian.
examples.zh: 後現代建築不完全是講究實用。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: We must leave to posterity to judge our success or failure.
examples.zh: 我們的是非成敗，得留給後人去評斷。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 大學畢業的 [名] 研究生

derivatives.meaning: [動] 畢業 [名] 畢業生 [形] 研究所的

examples.en: I’m going to graduate school for postgraduate studies.
examples.zh: 我大學畢業後要念研究所。

examples.en: As a postgraduate, I might be able to work as a teaching assistant.
examples.zh: 身為研究生，我或許可以兼任助教。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The meeting had to be postponed for the typhoon.
examples.zh: 會議因為颱風只得延期。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: In his essay “A Modest Proposal,” Jonathan Swift made the preposterous suggestion that excess children be used for food.
examples.zh: 在他的〈一個小小提議〉的文章中，強納森·史威夫特提出荒謬的建議，主張多餘的小孩可以拿來當食物。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 疫情；傳染病 [形] 傳染的；泛濫的

examples.en: There is an epidemic of dengue fever going on in the South.
examples.zh: 南部登革熱疫情蔓延。

examples.en: Tuberculosis is an epidemic disease.
examples.zh: 肺結核是一種傳染病。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: “A stitch in time saves nine” is an epigram that you should remember.
examples.zh: 「即時縫上一針，省得將來得縫九針」這句警語你該牢記。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: In the epilogue the author describes how the main characters were doing 20 years later.
examples.zh: 在書末的後記，作者描述了幾位主角 20 年後的境況。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: John Keats’ epitaph reads, “Here lies One Whose name was writ in Water.”
examples.zh: 約翰·濟慈的墓誌銘：「長眠此處者，聲名隨波而逝。」

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: All ambiguous sentences should be corrected or deleted from your composition.
examples.zh: 你這篇作文裡所有模稜兩可的句子都要訂正或刪除。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 氣氛，周圍環境（或拼作 ambiance）

examples.en: I like the ambience of this coffee shop.
examples.zh: 我喜歡這家咖啡店的氣氛。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The girl had ambivalent feelings about her boyfriend and couldn’t decide whether to leave him.
examples.zh: 這名女孩對她男朋友又愛又恨，拿不定主意該不該離開他。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 兩棲動物 [形] 兩棲的；水陸兩用的

examples.en: Frogs are amphibians.
examples.zh: 青蛙是兩棲類動物。

examples.en: Amphibian vehicles are very convenient.
examples.zh: 兩棲運輸工具很方便。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The playwright staged her new play in an amphitheater.
examples.zh: 劇作家在圓形劇場推出她的新戲。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The ring road runs around the periphery of the city center.
examples.zh: 外環道路環繞市中心周圍一圈。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 期刊 [形] 週期性的

examples.en: The paper was published in a leading periodical in the field.
examples.zh: 這篇論文刊登在業界頂尖的期刊上。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Modern submarines still rely on periscopes, although to a lesser extent.
examples.zh: 現代潛艦依然要倚賴潛望鏡，不過倚賴的程度不比從前。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 平行的；相似處 [動] 與⋯平行；與⋯相似

examples.en: I’m trying to see if there’s any parallel between the two cases.
examples.zh: 我正在研究這兩個案子之間有無類似之處。

examples.en: Two parallel lines never meet.
examples.zh: 兩條平行線永不相交。

examples.en: This election closely parallels the one four years ago.
examples.zh: 這場選舉和四年前的那一場很像。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: A sudden snowstorm paralyzed the city.
examples.zh: 突來的大風雪癱瘓了城市。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Two paramedics came with the ambulance.
examples.zh: 兩名醫務輔助人員隨救護車前來。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Financial speculators are parasites on the national economy.
examples.zh: 金融投機客是國家經濟的寄生蟲。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The lady in red is carrying a pink parasol.
examples.zh: 紅衣女子撐著一把粉紅色陽傘。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: We teach students how to survive in the society.
examples.zh: 我們教學生如何在社會中求生存。

examples.en: The man survived the war and lived to be 90 years old.
examples.zh: 此人在戰爭中活下來，一直活到90歲。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The performance last night was superb.
examples.zh: 昨晚的表演太棒了。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: There are only superficial similarities between these very different species.
examples.zh: 這些品種大不相同，相似處只在表面。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The team leader supervises five people at work.
examples.zh: 小組組長監督五人工作。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The U.S. has enjoyed nuclear supremacy ever since the collapse of the USSR.
examples.zh: 蘇聯解體以後，美國就享有核武霸權。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Japan enjoys huge amounts of trade surplus.
examples.zh: 日本有鉅額的貿易盈餘。

examples.en: The government sells surplus weapons abroad.
examples.zh: 政府將過剩的武器銷售到國外。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 概論，導論 [動] 測量；調查

examples.en: This is a survey course on biology.
examples.zh: 這堂課是生物學概論。

examples.en: Engineers surveyed the land thoroughly before building a railroad.
examples.zh: 工程師仔細測量地形之後才開始興築鐵路。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 水面下的 [名] 潛水艇

examples.en: The biologist is an expert on submarine plants.
examples.zh: 這位生物學家是水生植物專家。

examples.en: A nuclear submarine is a powerful weapon of deterrence.
examples.zh: 核子潛艇是強大的嚇阻性武器。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: A subcompact is easy to park.
examples.zh: 小型車很好停車。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The visitor is awed by the sublime beauty of the Grand Canyon.
examples.zh: 遊客面對壯麗的大峽谷，敬畏之心油然而生。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: There are many subterranean caves in this area.
examples.zh: 這一區有許多地下洞穴。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Octavius was Caesar’s successor.
examples.zh: 屋大維是凱撒的繼承者。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The gymnast’s limbs are very supple.
examples.zh: 這名體操選手的肢體柔軟度很好。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: “I won the lottery!” exclaimed the excited winner.
examples.zh: 「我中樂透了！」中獎人興奮地大喊。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Taking a cookie break while studying is one of the most efficacious ways of rejuvenating the mind that I have ever discovered.
examples.zh: 讀書讀到一半吃點小點心休息一下，我發現這是提振精神最有效的方法之一。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The newspaper article enumerates the many good deeds that the man has done.
examples.zh: 報上的文章列舉此人做過的諸多好事。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Darwin’s theory of evolution has been called the greatest intellectual achievement of the 19th century.
examples.zh: 達爾文的演化論被稱為19世紀最偉大的知識成就。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 外來的，異國情調的；珍奇的

examples.en: The zoo has recently acquired many exotic tropical birds.
examples.zh: 這座動物園最近購入許多熱帶珍稀鳥禽。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [動] 流放或移居國外 [名] 流放或移居國外者 [形] 流放或移居國外的

examples.en: The criminal was expatriated and not allowed to return.
examples.zh: 這名罪犯被驅逐出境，不准再入境。

examples.en: US expatriates in this country mostly stick together.
examples.zh: 旅居本國的美籍外僑多半聚集一處。

examples.en: Expatriate Chinese often live in Chinatowns.
examples.zh: 海外華人通常住在中國城。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: “The patient expired at 3 a.m.,” said the doctor.
examples.zh: 「病人於凌晨三點過世。」醫生說。

examples.en: The contract is going to expire at midnight today.
examples.zh: 合約將於今天午夜到期。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Animals in captivity sometimes demonstrate abnormal behavior.
examples.zh: 被圈養的動物有時會有異常的行為。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Civilized people abhor war and violence.
examples.zh: 文明人都厭惡戰爭與暴力。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: There’s an aboriginal village high in the mountains.
examples.zh: 高山上有個原住民村落。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: away / 形容詞字尾 / mind / 形容詞字尾

examples.en: The absentminded professor can never remember where he left his glasses.
examples.zh: 這名心不在焉的教授，老是忘記眼鏡放在哪裡。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Amazingly, the alcoholic abstained from drinking for a whole week.
examples.zh: 這個酒鬼竟整週都沒碰酒，真令人驚訝。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: You must add an abstract to your paper before handing it in.
examples.zh: 論文要交出之前得加上摘要。

examples.en: Abstract painting is my favorite, but I also love still life.
examples.zh: 抽象畫是我的最愛，但我也喜歡靜物畫。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Modern nations no longer practice racial segregation.
examples.zh: 現代國家不再實行種族隔離政策。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The South seceded from the Union in 1860.
examples.zh: 1860 年美國南方脫離聯邦宣告獨立。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The hermit lives alone by a secluded lake.
examples.zh: 這名隱士在隱蔽的湖邊獨居。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: I joined the tour because I was seduced by the price.
examples.zh: 我因為受到價格的誘惑，參加了套裝旅遊行程。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Chunghwa Telecom is a telecommunications provider.
examples.zh: 中華電信是電信服務業者。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The magazine editor telecommutes via email.
examples.zh: 這名雜誌編輯利用電郵進行遠距辦公。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: far / together / carry / 名詞字尾

examples.en: The company has branches all over the world and relies on teleconferencing to keep in sync.
examples.zh: 這家公司在全世界都有分公司，靠電信會議保持同步。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Most people find telemarketing annoying.
examples.zh: 大部分的人都覺得電話行銷很煩。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The magician claimed to be capable of telepathy, and then started reading the audience’s minds.
examples.zh: 魔術師號稱具有超感應，然後就對觀眾展開讀心術。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Web translations are increasingly reliable.
examples.zh: 網頁翻譯愈來愈可靠。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: not / across / act / 形容詞字尾

examples.en: The talk broke down because both sides remained intransigent.
examples.zh: 談判觸礁，因為雙方都一直不願妥協。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: A smile transcends all language barriers.
examples.zh: 微笑可以克服任何語言障礙。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The Admissions Office needs 10 copies of your academic transcripts.
examples.zh: 入學許可辦事處需要你提供十份大學成績單。

examples.en: The secretary is transcribing the recording into typed texts.
examples.zh: 祕書正在把錄音打成文字檔。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The victim requires immediate blood transfusion.
examples.zh: 受害者需要立刻輸血。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The package is in transit and should arrive in a couple of days.
examples.zh: 包裹正在運送中，應該過兩天會到。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The china is so fine and delicate that it’s translucent.
examples.zh: 這件瓷器非常細緻，甚至可以透光。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Nothing short of a heart transplant can save the patient.
examples.zh: 除了心臟移植手術，沒有別的辦法可以救這位病人了。

examples.en: Transplanted from the mountains, the tree looks unhealthy.
examples.zh: 這棵樹從山上移植下來以後，看起來不大健康。

Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.zh: 李奧納多．達文西是個真正的萬事通。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.zh: 老虎是肉食性動物，綿羊是草食性動物，猴子則是雜食性動物。

examples.en: The teacher told the students to form a semicircle before him.
examples.zh: 老師叫學生在他面前圍成半圓。

examples.zh: 氣旋在北半球是逆時針方向旋轉。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: half / together / lead / 名詞字尾

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The dancer performed a solo, accompanied by the piano.
examples.zh: 舞蹈家演出一支獨舞，由鋼琴伴奏。

examples.en: Charles Lindbergh’s solo flight across the Atlantic won him lasting fame.
examples.zh: 林白單人飛越大西洋，贏得了不朽的名聲。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The new CEO consolidated his power by inserting his people into key positions.
examples.zh: 新任執行長鞏固了他的權力，做法是安插自己的人馬出任要職。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The man was the sole survivor of the plane crash.
examples.zh: 此人是墜機意外的唯一倖存者。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Most people are familiar with the famous soliloquy that begins “To be or not to be.”
examples.zh: 大多數人對 To be or not to be 開始的那段著名獨白都很熟悉。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: I often go by myself to the mountains to enjoy the solitude.
examples.zh: 我常常一個人上山，去享受獨處時光。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 制服 [形] 劃一的，一致的

examples.en: Students at that private school have to wear uniforms.
examples.zh: 那家私校的學生得穿制服。

examples.en: These receptionists are all of uniform height.
examples.zh: 這些接待員的身高都一致。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 無異議的，意見一致的

examples.en: The bill had unanimous approval in Congress.
examples.zh: 法案在國會獲得一致支持。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The unification of East and West Germany has been a success so far.
examples.zh: 東西德統一，迄今相當成功。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The President declared a unilateral cut in nuclear warheads.
examples.zh: 總統宣告將片面減核彈頭的數量。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Marriage should be the union of two people in love.
examples.zh: 婚姻應該是兩個相愛的人的結合。

examples.en: The US President traditionally delivers a “State of the Union” address at the beginning of a new year.
examples.zh: 美國總統照例會在新年開頭宣讀「國情咨文」。

examples.en: The labor union is a powerful organization.
examples.zh: 工會是個有力的組織。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Your handwriting is unique and easily recognizable.
examples.zh: 你的筆跡獨一無二，很容易辨認。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: This is a Chinese-English bilingual dictionary.
examples.zh: 這是本中英雙語字典。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 兩年一次的 [名] 雙年展；二年生植物

examples.en: There is a famous biennial art exhibition at Venice.
examples.zh: 威尼斯有一個著名的雙年展。

examples.en: The Taipei Biennial is getting better and better.
examples.zh: 台北雙年展越癒好了。

examples.en: The plant is a biennial, flowering and dying in its second year.
examples.zh: 這是二年生植物，第二年開花、死亡。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Bigamy is a civil offense in Taiwan.
examples.zh: 重婚在台灣是民事罪。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: This year’s Taiwan-American bilateral trade talks are going on at the International Conference Center.
examples.zh: 今年的台美雙邊談判正在國際會議中心進行中。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Binoculars are best for bird-watching whereas telescopes are ideal for observing heavenly bodies.
examples.zh: 雙筒望遠鏡最適合用來賞鳥，單筒望遠鏡則適合觀星。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Humans are bipeds whereas cows are quadrupeds.
examples.zh: 人是雙足動物，牛則是四足動物。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [動] 複製 [名] 複製品 [形] 複製的

examples.en: A cell duplicates itself when it divides.
examples.zh: 細胞分裂時會自我複製。

examples.en: This painting is a duplicate of the original.
examples.zh: 這幅畫是原作的複製品。

examples.en: The teacher handed out duplicate copies to all the students.
examples.zh: 老師發複印的版本給所有學生。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The agent was accused of duplicity in brokering the deal.
examples.zh: 該經紀人被指控在進行交易時有詐欺行為。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 三人組；三重奏（唱）；三件一組

examples.en: He plays the saxophone in a jazz trio.
examples.zh: 他在爵士三重奏中擔任薩克斯風手。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The trilateral talks involve school officials, parents and students.
examples.zh: 三方會談包括校方人員、家長與學生。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The Lord of the Rings was written as a trilogy.
examples.zh: 《魔戒》是以三部曲形式寫成的。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Abortion can be most safely done in the first trimester.
examples.zh: 墮胎在頭三個月進行比較安全。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The Holy Trinity includes the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit.
examples.zh: 三位一體包括聖父、聖子、聖靈。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Professional photographers like to use tripods while shooting.
examples.zh: 專業攝影師拍照時愛用三腳架。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 四人組；四重奏（唱）；四件一組

examples.en: A string quartet comprises two violins, a viola and a cello.
examples.zh: 弦樂四重奏包括兩把小提琴、一把中提琴以及一把大提琴。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The company's headquarters is/are in London.
examples.zh: 公司總部位於倫敦。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: There are tall buildings all around the quadrangle.
examples.zh: 方形廣場四周有高樓環繞。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The river runs through the northeast quadrant of the city.
examples.zh: 河流流經城市的東北部。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Most mammals are quadrupeds.
examples.zh: 大部分的哺乳類都是四足動物。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The dog had to spend several months in quarantine when it reached the U.S.
examples.zh: 狗送達美國時得隔離幾個月。

examples.en: It was quarantined for several months.
examples.zh: 牠被隔離了幾個月。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: He bought a quart of milk at the convenience store.
examples.zh: 他在便利商店買了一夸脫牛奶。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: This is the bustling commercial quarter of the city.
examples.zh: 這是城裡忙碌的商業區。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The Defense Department is located in the Pentagon.
examples.zh: 國防部位於五角大廈。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The modern pentathlon includes swimming, running, horseback-riding, fencing, and shooting.
examples.zh: 現代五項全能運動包括游泳、跑步、馬術、擊劍以及射擊。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The three men and two women sang in a quintet.
examples.zh: 三男兩女表演五重唱。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [形] 最精華的；最有代表性的

examples.en: The kimono is the quintessential Japanese costume.
examples.zh: 和服是最典型的日本服飾。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Snowflakes are hexagons.
examples.zh: 雪花是六邊形。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Ants are the most common hexapods.
examples.zh: 螞蟻是最常見的昆蟲。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 六十至六十九歲的人

examples.en: My uncle is a sexagenarian but he hasn't retired yet.
examples.zh: 我叔叔六十多歲了，但還沒有退休。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The women's heptathlon involves seven competitions.
examples.zh: 女子七項全能運動包括七種競賽。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 七十至七十九歲的人

examples.en: Most septuagenarians are retired.
examples.zh: 七十幾歲的人大多退休了。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The octopus is among the most intelligent creatures in the sea.
examples.zh: 章魚是海裡最聰明的生物之一。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 八十至八十九歲的人

examples.en: Did you read Lin Yutang's Memoirs of an Octogenarian?
examples.zh: 你有沒有讀過林語堂的《八十自述》？

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: One nanometer is one-billionth of a meter.
examples.zh: 一奈米是十億分之一公尺。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.literal_meaning: nine / skill / word / 名詞字尾

examples.en: Nanotechnology involves working with atoms and molecules to build minuscule devices.
examples.zh: 奈米科技牽涉到運用原子與分子來建造微型裝置。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Computer technology has come a long way in this decade.
examples.zh: 電腦科技這十年來突飛猛進。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The Olympic champion in decathlon is often called the greatest athlete on Earth.
examples.zh: 奧運十項全能運動冠軍常被稱作是地球上最偉大的運動員。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: In the decimal system, the decimal point separates the integral part and the fractional part of a number.
examples.zh: 在十進位中，小數點分隔整數部分與小數部分。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The earthquake decimated the island.
examples.zh: 這場地震重創該島嶼。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

words.definition: [名] 一百週年 [形] 百年的

examples.en: Americans mounted centennial celebrations in 1876, and in 1976 they celebrated their bicentennial.
examples.zh: 美國在1876年舉辦建國百週年慶，在1976年又舉辦建國兩百週年慶。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: Japan is famous for its numerous centenarians.
examples.zh: 日本以眾多百歲人瑞著稱。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: One foot is equivalent to 30.48 centimeters.
examples.zh: 一英尺相當於30.48公分。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The police found 200 kilograms of marijuana in the truck.
examples.zh: 警方在卡車裡找到200公斤的大麻。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The attached document is a small, 50-kilobyte file.
examples.zh: 附檔是小小的50KB（千位元組）檔案。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The official distance of a marathon is 42.195 kilometers.
examples.zh: 馬拉松的標準長度是42.195公里。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

derivatives.meaning: [形] 千禧年的 [名] 千禧世代，Y世代

examples.en: We are at the beginning of the third millennium.
examples.zh: 我們正處於第三千禧年的開頭。

examples.en: Millennials tend to wed later, if at all.
examples.zh: 千禧世代如果有結婚的話通常較為晚婚。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The CWB predicts that the typhoon will bring 300 millimeters of rain to the Yangmingshan area.
examples.zh: 中央氣象局預測颱風將為陽明山地區帶來300公釐的雨量。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: This is a small, 512-megabyte SD card.
examples.zh: 這是一枚 512MB（百萬位元組）小容量的安全數位卡。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

derivatives.meaning: [形] 自大狂的 [名] 自大狂者

examples.en: The man suffers from megalomania and believes he must save the world.
examples.zh: 此人患有自大狂，認為要靠他來拯救世界。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: The budget for national defense is gigantic.
examples.zh: 國防預算十分龐大。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: This PC comes with a 500-gigabyte hard drive.
examples.zh: 這台個人電腦內建 500G（十億位元組）的硬碟。

words.part_name: Part 1 通用學術字彙：依字首分類

examples.en: This house has a convenient location.
examples.zh: 這間房子的地點便利。

examples.en: The dentist is still trying to locate the nerve.
examples.zh: 牙醫還在找神經。

examples.en: The house is located near a river.
examples.zh: 房子座落在河川不遠處。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: As General Manager, you must see to it that company resources are allocated equally.
examples.zh: 身為總經理，你得負責將公司資源作公平的分配。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Some animals achieve locomotion by changing body shape.
examples.zh: 有些動物達成位移，靠的是體型變化。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The stock market and the real estate market are the twin locomotives of a nation’s economy.
examples.zh: 股市和房市是帶動國家經濟的一對火車頭。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: He went to see a doctor to relocate his dislocated shoulder.
examples.zh: 他去看醫生，請醫生幫他將脫臼的肩膀復位。

examples.en: The company has relocated to Shanghai.
examples.zh: 公司已經搬到上海了。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [動] 集中，專注 [名] 濃縮液

examples.en: It’s difficult to concentrate on the reading, with so much noise around.
examples.zh: 四周太吵，很難專注在閱讀上。

examples.en: The bottled juice was restored from juice concentrates.
examples.zh: 瓶裝果汁是由果汁濃縮液還原而成。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The shooting target is composed of a series of concentric circles.
examples.zh: 射擊標靶是由一圈一圈的同心圓構成的。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The company decentralized operations by setting up eight branch offices.
examples.zh: 公司分散營運，做法是成立八家分部。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [形] 古怪的 [名] 古怪的人

examples.en: Howard Hughes became an eccentric billionaire who had an abnormal fear of germs.
examples.zh: 霍華·休斯變成一名怪異的富豪，對細菌有不正常的恐懼。

examples.en: My uncle is a delightful old eccentric.
examples.zh: 我叔叔是個可愛的怪老頭子。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Ancient Egyptians calculated the circumference of the globe by measuring shadows.
examples.zh: 古埃及人透過測量影子計算地球周長。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The management consultant is a familiar figure on the lecture circuit.
examples.zh: 這名管理顧問是巡迴演講的常見人物。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: High cholesterol tends to impede blood circulation.
examples.zh: 高膽固醇會阻礙血液循環。

examples.en: There are a lot of counterfeit 20-dollar bills in circulation.
examples.zh: 有許多 20 元偽鈔在市面上流通。

examples.en: This newspaper has a circulation of over one million.
examples.zh: 這份報紙的發行量超過一百萬份。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The man has been successful because he is always circumspect in his dealings.
examples.zh: 此人一向成功，因為他與人打交道時都非常謹慎。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The businessman circumvented government regulations by registering his company with a foreign country.
examples.zh: 這名商人規避政府法規，做法是將公司登記在外國。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: One can contribute to carbon reduction simply by recycling old newspapers.
examples.zh: 我們只要回收舊報紙，就能對減碳做出貢獻。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The invention of the contraceptive pill brought about profound changes in the lives of women.
examples.zh: 避孕藥的發明，對女性的生活帶來重大改變。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

derivatives.meaning: [名] 基本教義派 [形] 基本教義派的

examples.en: There’s a fundamental difference between these two political parties.
examples.zh: 這兩個政黨在本質上是不相同的。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The university was founded by a Christian sect.
examples.zh: 這所大學是由一個基督教派創辦的。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [名] 創立；地基；根據；基金會

examples.en: The foundations will have to be reinforced to keep the house from sinking further into the ground.
examples.zh: 地基得加強，以免房屋進一步塌陷。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [形] 根本的；徹底的；激進的

examples.en: We need to make some radical changes to survive.
examples.zh: 我們得做出徹底的改變才能生存。

examples.en: These terrorists belong to a radical wing of extremists.
examples.zh: 這些恐怖分子屬於極端派中的一個激進派系。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Polio has now been completely eradicated.
examples.zh: 小兒麻痺症現在已經完全根除了。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The most erudite people in medical research attended the conference.
examples.zh: 醫學研究界最博學的人士都參加了這場會議。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: When an infant is born, it possesses only rudimentary eyesight and cannot see very well.
examples.zh: 嬰兒出生時只有基本的視力，看得並不清楚。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [名] 最大限度 [形] 最大限度的

examples.en: Two hundred dollars is the maximum I am willing to spend on dinner.
examples.zh: 二百元是我願意花在晚餐的上限。

examples.en: What is the maximum speed of this car?

examples.en: Please confine your discussions to the issues on the agenda.
examples.zh: 討論範圍僅限於議程表列出的議題。

examples.en: You can make any request, within the confines of reason.
examples.zh: 你可以提出任何要求，只要不超出合理的範圍。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: You can look up the definition of any word in a dictionary.
examples.zh: 任何字的定義都可以在字典中查到。

examples.en: “Man” used to be defined as “an animal capable of reason.”
examples.zh: 「人」過去被定義為「理性動物」。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

words.definition: [名] 決賽入圍者，晉級決賽隊伍

examples.en: I was a finalist at the national beauty contest.
examples.zh: 我曾經入圍全國選美比賽的決賽。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: The bank turned down the loan with finality.
examples.zh: 銀行拒絕提供貸款，沒有商量的餘地。

examples.en: After extended negotiations, the lawyers eventually finalized the contract.
examples.zh: 經過漫長的談判，律師終於確定了合約內容。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: We have only a finite number of days to live, so we should make good use of every one of them.
examples.zh: 人生在世，可以活的日子有限，每一天都要好好把握。

examples.en: The universe is infinite.
examples.zh: 宇宙無限大。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: How do you determine the age of this antique desk?
examples.zh: 這張骨董桌的年分要如何判定？

examples.en: This piece of old coin is of indeterminate value.
examples.zh: 這枚古幣的價值尚不能斷定。

examples.en: The recluse believes everything is predetermined.
examples.zh: 這名隱士相信一切都是命中註定。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: The two countries are conterminous for over 1,000 miles.
examples.zh: 兩國邊界有一千多英里長。

examples.en: The company has offices in all 48 conterminous states.
examples.zh: 公司在相連的48個州都設有辦事處。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: The company promises to exterminate cockroaches in any home.
examples.zh: 該公司保證可以消滅所有人家中的蟑螂。

examples.en: The couple decided to terminate their marriage in a divorce.
examples.zh: 這對夫婦決定離婚，結束他們的婚姻。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: The company has agreed to bail us out, but what are its terms?
examples.zh: 公司答應幫我們紓困，但是有什麼條件嗎？

examples.en: You shouldn’t think of everything in terms of money.
examples.zh: 你不該什麼事情都從金錢的角度來看。

examples.en: “Anemia” is a medical term.
examples.zh: 「貧血」是醫學術語。

examples.en: Legal terminology can be confusing to laymen.
examples.zh: 法律用語，外行人會搞不清楚。

examples.en: Mid-term exam is next week.
examples.zh: 期中考在下週。

examples.en: The President is in his second term now.
examples.zh: 總統目前是第二任期。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

words.definition: [形] 末期的 [名] 終點站；終端機

examples.en: The terminal patient has decided to check out of the hospital.
examples.zh: 這名末期病人決定辦理出院。

examples.en: You should board your flight from Terminal Two.
examples.zh: 你應該到二航廈登機。

examples.en: The factory is located near the railway terminus.
examples.zh: 工廠位於火車總站附近。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: The information is confidential, which means you can’t disclose it to anybody.
examples.zh: 這則消息要保密，不能透露給任何人知道。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: The kid opened the closet to make sure nothing was hiding there.
examples.zh: 小孩打開櫥櫃，確保沒有什麼躲在裡面。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: It’s illegal for clubs to exclude members based on skin color.
examples.zh: 社團因為膚色而排除社員，這是犯法的。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: The contract grants me exclusive rights to sell this product in Taiwan.
examples.zh: 這份合約授予我在台灣銷售這項產品的獨家權利。

examples.en: This magazine has an exclusive interview with the President.
examples.zh: 這本雜誌有總統的獨家專訪。

examples.en: That nobleman is a member of an exclusive country club.
examples.zh: 那位貴族是一家高檔鄉村俱樂部的會員。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

words.definition: [動] 排除……的可能性，使不可能

examples.en: The rain precluded any chance of a game tonight.
examples.zh: 這場大雨排除了今晚比賽的可能性。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: In his old age, the billionaire lived as a recluse.
examples.zh: 到了老年，這名億萬富豪過著隱居的生活。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類
words.chapter_name: 表示「發生」與「結束」的字根

examples.en: I am fluent in oral and written English.
examples.zh: 我英語說寫流利。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Waste is a sign of an affluent society.
examples.zh: 浪費是富裕社會的象徵。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: A city developed at the confluence of the two rivers.
examples.zh: 兩河匯流處發展出一座城市。

examples.en: A happy confluence of events kept the city growing.
examples.zh: 許多好事正好碰在一起，讓城市持續成長。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Don’t worry too much about the normal fluctuations on the stock market.
examples.zh: 股市正常的起伏不用太擔心。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [名] 液體 [形] 流質的；流暢的

examples.en: I drink a lot of fluids when I have a cold.
examples.zh: 感冒時我會攝取大量液體。

examples.en: The patient can consume only fluid food.
examples.zh: 病人現在只能攝取流質食物。

examples.en: The fluid movements of the dancer are pleasing to watch.
examples.zh: 舞蹈家流暢的動作看起來賞心悅目。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [名] 一陣（情緒） [動] 臉紅；沖水

examples.en: In a flush of anger, he left the room.
examples.zh: 在一陣憤怒之下，他離開房間。

examples.en: The kid’s face flushed with excitement.
examples.zh: 小孩的臉興奮通紅。

examples.en: You can flush the cockroach down the toilet.
examples.zh: 你可以把蟑螂丟進馬桶沖掉。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The influx of hot money boosted stock prices.
examples.zh: 熱錢流入，抬高了股價。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: While you’re running in a race, all superfluous movements should be eliminated.
examples.zh: 賽跑時，不應該出現任何多餘的動作。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The accident occurred in the middle of the night.
examples.zh: 意外發生在半夜。

examples.en: Did it ever occur to you that you might be wrong?
examples.zh: 你有沒有想過，可能是你搞錯了？

examples.en: I often have recurring nightmares.
examples.zh: 我經常反覆做同一個惡夢。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: A concourse of people gathered in front of the Presidential Hall.
examples.zh: 一群人聚集在總統府前。

examples.en: “Here’s the concourse level,” announced the subway elevator recording.
examples.zh: 「出站樓層到了。」地鐵電梯錄音廣播。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: His wedding concurred with his birthday.
examples.zh: 他的婚禮與生日在同一天。

examples.en: “I concur,” said the doctor to the assistant after the latter gave his opinion on the case.
examples.zh: 助手表達對病例的看法之後，醫生表示：「我同意。」

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: I heard footsteps in the corridor.
examples.zh: 我聽到走廊傳來腳步聲。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [名] 信差；快遞人員 [動] 快遞

examples.en: The man served as a diplomatic courier at the Foreign Ministry.
examples.zh: 此人在外交部擔任外交信差。

examples.en: Please courier the package to me at your earliest convenience.
examples.zh: 請儘早將包裹快遞給我。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: You can exchange foreign currency at the bank.
examples.zh: 你可以在那家銀行換外匯。

examples.en: Some new words coined by the author are slowly gaining currency.
examples.zh: 作者創造的一些新字慢慢流行起來。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: I read newspapers to keep abreast of current situations.
examples.zh: 我看報紙以掌握當前局勢。

examples.en: electric current
examples.zh: 電流

examples.en: water current
examples.zh: 水流

examples.en: air current
examples.zh: 氣流

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: I have a heavy curriculum this year.
examples.zh: 我今年選的課很重。

examples.en: I don’t have time for many extracurricular activities.
examples.zh: 很多課外活動我都沒有時間參加。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Move the cursor to the icon and double-click.
examples.zh: 將游標移到圖象上點兩下。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The teacher took a cursory look at the composition and gave an F.
examples.zh: 老師草草看了一下作文，給了個不及格。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: On such a hot summer day, I like to take an excursion into the mountains.
examples.zh: 如此炎炎夏日，我喜歡到山上玩。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The man incurred a large debt after playing the stock market on borrowed money.
examples.zh: 此人透過融資炒股票，導致背負大筆債務。

examples.en: The company will reimburse you on any expense incurred during the business trip.
examples.zh: 這趟出差所產生的開銷，公司都會會補貼給你。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: His arrival infused new life and energy into the group.
examples.zh: 他的到來，為團體注入了新的生命與能量。

examples.en: The tea should be allowed to infuse for a few minutes.
examples.zh: 應該讓茶葉先浸泡幾分鐘。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The strategy confounded our opponents.
examples.zh: 這一招讓我們對手感到困惑。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: She blushed at her supervisor’s effusive praise.
examples.zh: 老闆的盛讚令她臉紅。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: All our efforts proved futile.
examples.zh: 我們一切的努力終歸徒勞。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The victims were profuse in their thanks to the donors.
examples.zh: 受害者不斷地感謝捐款人。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: You had better not drive even if you drank only a little diluted wine.
examples.zh: 就算只喝了一點摻了水的酒，最好還是別開車。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: He accompanies his daily ablutions with songs.
examples.zh: 他每天洗澡時都會唱歌。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The deluge caused severe mudslides.
examples.zh: 大雨引發嚴重的土石流。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [形] 慷慨的；大量的 [動] 浪費；大量給予

examples.en: In the hotel room there was a lavish display of flowers.
examples.zh: 旅館房間裡擺設了大量花卉。

examples.en: The coach lavished praise on the winning team.
examples.zh: 教練大力讚揚獲勝的隊伍。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Alaska has a sparse population.
examples.zh: 阿拉斯加人口稀疏。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The crowd dispersed once the show ended.
examples.zh: 表演結束後，觀眾四散。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The book is interspersed with rare pictures.
examples.zh: 這本書穿插了一些罕見的照片。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The old couple will soon be celebrating their 50th wedding anniversary.
examples.zh: 這對老夫婦即將歡慶結婚 50 週年。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [形] 年度的；一年的 [名] 一年生植物

examples.en: Welcome to our annual conference.
examples.zh: 歡迎參加我們的年會。

examples.en: This plant is an annual.
examples.zh: 這是一年生植物。

examples.en: Economic growth of the first quarter is annualized to compare with last year’s figure.
examples.zh: 將第一季的經濟成長率換算為年率，以便和去年的數字比較。

examples.en: I have bought an annuity plan in preparation for retirement.
examples.zh: 我購買了年金規畫，準備退休。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [形] 一年兩次的；兩年一次的

examples.en: Our biannual garden parties are in January and July.
examples.zh: 我們一年兩次的園遊會在元月和七月舉行。

examples.en: The art exhibit is a biannual event that won’t happen again for two years.
examples.zh: 這是兩年一次的美術展，兩年後才會再次舉行。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Events in the narrative are arranged in chronological order.
examples.zh: 這敘述中的事件按時間先後順序編排。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [形] 慢性的；長期的；習慣性的

examples.en: Arthritis is a chronic disease.
examples.zh: 關節炎是慢性病。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [名] 編年史；記事 [動] (依時間順序) 記錄

examples.en: The book is a chronicle of the American Civil War.
examples.zh: 這本書是美國南北戰爭的編年史。

examples.en: It chronicles all the important events in the war.
examples.zh: 它按照時間順序記錄戰爭中的大事。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The synchronous arrival of a baby sister and loss of a beloved grandmother strongly affected the child.
examples.zh: 小妹誕生時，親愛的奶奶剛好過世，對這個小孩造成很大的影響。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The diurnal tides occur at a cycle slightly longer than 12 hours.
examples.zh: 每天的潮水是循環出現的，間隔 12 小時多一點。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The owl is a nocturnal predator.
examples.zh: 貓頭鷹是夜間掠食者。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

words.definition: [動] 逗留，旅居 [名] 旅居期間

examples.en: The retired couple leisurely sojourned with friends and relatives scattered across the country.
examples.zh: 這對退休夫婦悠閒度日，四處短暫借宿於散居在全國各地的親友家。

examples.en: He picked up French during his two-year’s sojourn in Paris.
examples.zh: 旅居巴黎的那兩年，他學會了法語。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The policeman signaled to the motorist to pull over.
examples.zh: 警察示意請駕駛靠邊停車。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The commotion in the street drew the police.
examples.zh: 街上的騷動招來了警察。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The woman was overcome with emotion and couldn’t speak.
examples.zh: 這名婦女激動不已，連話都說不出來。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The demonstrators turned into a mob and started throwing rocks.
examples.zh: 示威群眾轉變為暴民，開始丟擲石頭。

examples.en: A couple of mobsters threatened to wreck the shop, demanding payment.
examples.zh: 兩名暴徒以砸店作為威脅，要求店家拿錢出來。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: A scooter provides the best mobility in the crowded city.
examples.zh: 在擁擠的城市裡，機車的機動性最佳。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Reserve officers will be mobilized if war should break out.
examples.zh: 如果發生戰爭，將動員預備軍官。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Are you familiar with Newton’s law of momentum?
examples.zh: 你熟悉牛頓的運動定律嗎？

examples.en: Environmentalism has gathered a lot of momentum in recent years.
examples.zh: 環保運動近年來累積了龐大的動能。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: Motivation is important in any classroom.
examples.zh: 動機在任何一間教室都是很重要的。

examples.en: Motivation of the players is the coach’s responsibility.
examples.zh: 激勵球員的士氣是教練的責任。

examples.en: Money and revenge are the two motives behind the murder.
examples.zh: 錢財與報復，是凶殺案後的兩項動機。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The manager was promoted after he completed the project.
examples.zh: 計畫完成之後，經理就升官了。

examples.en: The company spent a lot of money promoting the new product.
examples.zh: 公司花大錢促銷新產品。

examples.en: The officer was demoted because a soldier under his command deserted.
examples.zh: 軍官被降職處分，因為他管轄下的一名士兵逃跑。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: There’s a piano recital at the music hall tonight.
examples.zh: 音樂廳今晚有一場鋼琴獨奏。

words.part_name: Part 2 通用學術字彙：依字根分類

examples.en: The kinetic energy in the tides can be harnessed for power generation.
examples.zh: 潮汐蘊藏的動能可以用來發電。
