words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Photosynthesis by green plants is an important mechanism for removing carbon dioxide from the atmosphere.
examples.zh: 綠色植物的光合作用是移除大氣中的二氧化碳的重要機制。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Flowers in this vase have been meticulously arranged.
examples.zh: 花瓶裡的花經過精心的安排。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The company plans to modify its employment policies so as to recruit highly qualified candidates only.
examples.zh: 公司打算修改聘雇政策，只招聘卓越的求職者。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The distortion effect of air is most pronounced in the desert, where one often sees mirages.
examples.zh: 空氣的扭曲現象在沙漠中最明顯，常常可以看到幻象。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Picasso turned such mundane objects as newspapers and tennis balls into works of art.
examples.zh: 畢卡索把諸如報紙、網球這些平凡的東西都變成藝術品。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Colorful vegetables, notably pumpkins, are highly nutritious.
examples.zh: 色彩鮮豔的蔬菜營養豐富，尤其是南瓜。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The 17-year cicada stays out of sight for most of its exceptionally long life.
examples.zh: 壽命 17 年的蟬，在牠特別長的生命中，大部分的時間都處於看不見的地方。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The ideas in this article are outdated and no longer applicable.
examples.zh: 文章裡的觀念已經過時，不再適用。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The outermost ring of the city is inhabited by the commuters.
examples.zh: 通勤族住在城市的最外環。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: There are many more species overall in the Amazon jungle than anywhere else.
examples.zh: 整體而言，亞馬遜叢林裡的物種是世界各地最多的。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: After the eruption of the nearby volcano, the whole town was overlain by volcanic ash.
examples.zh: 附近座火山爆發之後，整個城鎮被火山灰覆蓋。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Goaded by an overwhelming sense of guilt, the criminal turned himself in.
examples.zh: 在強烈的罪惡感使之下，罪犯自首投案。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: I'd like to visit a museum in Venice, but I don't have a particular one in mind yet.
examples.zh: 我到威尼斯想參觀博物館，但還沒想到要去哪一間。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: In the fifth century BCE, Athens was at the peak of its power.
examples.zh: 西元前第五世紀，雅典正處於權力高峰。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: An arrow is equipped with a hard tip with which to penetrate its target.
examples.zh: 箭上裝上堅硬的箭頭，用以射穿標靶。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Sigmund Freud was a pioneer in the study of the subconscious.
examples.zh: 西格蒙德·佛洛伊德是研究潛意識的先驅。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Trucks arrived loaded with gravel to plug the holes in the road before paving it over.
examples.zh: 車載著碎石來到，要先填滿坑洞，然後重鋪路面。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The researcher came up with a practical way to harness the power of the waves.
examples.zh: 研究者提出一個實際可行的辦法來利用波浪產生的動能。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Prime agricultural land had all been taken up, so the new immigrants had to settle for land that is more rocky and barren.
examples.zh: 肥沃的農地都被佔領了，所以新移民只得接受岩石多、較貧瘠的土地。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: When one person disembarked, the seat he left behind was promptly taken by another.
examples.zh: 每當有一人下車，空出的座位很快就會被別人搶走。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The degree of enthusiasm is not a quantifiable thing.
examples.zh: 熱衷的程度是無法量化的。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Books in the public domain are readily available online.
examples.zh: 公版書在網路上很容易取得。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The presence of tall buildings tends to retard the dissipation of heat.
examples.zh: 高樓大廈林立，會導致散熱減緩。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The Indian social system was rigidly hierarchical, while that in ancient China was much more fluid and mobile.
examples.zh: 印度的社會有很嚴格的階級制度，中國的古代社會則有比較大的流動性。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The anthropologist has captured 10 minutes of ritual dancing on film.
examples.zh: 人類學家拍到了 10 分鐘的儀式舞蹈。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: My grandfather only received a rudimentary education.
examples.zh: 我爺爺只受過最基本的教育。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: There is a sacred spring beside the temple.
examples.zh: 寺廟旁有座聖泉。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The scarcity of food in the ocean depths has triggered ingenious adaptations.
examples.zh: 深海的食物匱乏，因而出現各種巧妙的適應方式。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The expedition encountered scores of wild elephants.
examples.zh: 探險隊碰到數十頭野象。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The king promised he would not seek to annex his smaller neighbor.
examples.zh: 國王保證他不會企圖併吞那個比較小的鄰國。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Surface runoff often seeps underground.
examples.zh: 表面流水常常滲透到地底下。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: After a prolonged draught, the food shortage in these areas is severe.
examples.zh: 漫長的乾旱之後，這些地區出現嚴重的食物短缺。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Having passed the great dune, the caravan shifted directions and headed east.
examples.zh: 越過了大沙丘，商隊轉而向東前行。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: A skeptical scientist called for proof of the hypothesis.
examples.zh: 一名存懷疑的科學家要求這項假說提出證據。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The unionization movement was spearheaded by veteran steelworkers.
examples.zh: 組織工會的運動由資深的鋼鐵工人站在第一線領導。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: “Might” often means “right” in the political sphere.
examples.zh: 在政治領域，「力量」往往就是「真理」。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The machine was a splendid invention that saved a great amount of labor.
examples.zh: 這機器是極佳的發明，大幅節省人力。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: A lot of time was squandered in trying to find the right tools.
examples.zh: 找適合的工具時浪費了許多時間。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Athenian democracy was a stunning success.
examples.zh: 雅典的民主是驚人的成就。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

words.definition: [形] 受到誘惑的，有…傾向的

examples.en: Since they look so much like us, people are always tempted to regard monkeys as smarter than other animals.
examples.zh: 因為猴子看起來和人很像，所以人們總是會認為猴子比其他動物聰明。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Two causes of the disaster have been tentatively identified.
examples.zh: 災難有兩項暫時認定的原因。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: There's nothing you can do here; therefore, you may leave.
examples.zh: 你在這裡幫不上什麼忙，所以可以走了。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The active volcano threatens an area of approximately 500 square miles.
examples.zh: 活火山威脅到大約 500 平方英里的範圍。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: This species of tomato is tolerant of drought and high temperatures.
examples.zh: 這種番茄能夠耐乾旱與高溫。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Traditionally, scientists formulate theories first and design experiments to confirm or refute them later.
examples.zh: 科學家一般都是先提出理論，然後設計實驗來證明或推翻它。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Petroleum and coal are organic materials trapped underground.
examples.zh: 石油與煤是有機物質，深埋在地底下。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The general arrived in uniform, with all the trappings.
examples.zh: 將軍身著掛滿裝飾的制服抵達。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Being robbed at gunpoint is a traumatic experience.
examples.zh: 遭人持槍搶劫是個會造成心理創傷的經驗。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: Heavy rains resulted in turbulent waters that muddied the river.
examples.zh: 大雨成洪流，使得河水混濁。

words.part_name: Part 5 托福TPO字彙：其他
words.chapter_name: Part 5 托福 TPO 字彙：其他

examples.en: The newly discovered primitive society is undergoing rapid change, and may be assimilated very quickly.
examples.zh: 這個新發現的原始社會正在經歷快速轉變，可能很快就會被同化。
